hero.heading: Healthy skin, lasting results
hero.lede:
Personalized Corrective Skincare in Eugene, Oregon

Whether you’re concerned about fine lines, wrinkles, acne, rosacea, pigmentation, dehydration, or skin sensitivity, every treatment is customized using advanced technologies like Glo2Facial®, Jet Plasma®, BioRePeel®, and ProCell® Microchanneling to restore skin health from within, not simply mask concerns

Healthy skin ages better. Start your journey with a personalized treatment plan designed for lasting results.

services.heading: Treatments designed for healthy, lasting results, customized for
services.sub:
Advanced Corrective Skincare Treatments

Personalized treatments designed to restore healthier, stronger skin.

Every treatment at Polished Skin in Eugene, Oregon is customized to your skin’s unique needs. Whether your goal is age management, rosacea relief, acne improvement, hyperpigmentation correction, or skin barrier restoration, we combine science backed treatments to improve skin health and deliver results that continue long after your appointment.

Explore our signature treatments below and discover which approach is right for your skin.

science.heading: Personalized treatments. Healthier skin.
science.body:
You don’t have to know which treatment is right for you, that’s our job.

At **Polished Skin in Eugene, Oregon**, every appointment begins with a comprehensive skin consultation. We assess your skin’s condition, discuss your concerns and goals, and create a personalized treatment plan designed specifically for you. Whether you’re looking for **age management, acne treatment, rosacea care, hyperpigmentation correction, or skin barrier restoration**, every recommendation is based on what your skin truly needs.

By combining advanced treatments like **Glo2Facial®, Jet Plasma®, BioRePeel®, ProCell® Microchanneling, and customized corrective facials**, we focus on improving your skin’s health, supporting collagen production, strengthening the skin barrier, and delivering results that continue to improve over time.

Because healthier skin doesn’t come from chasing trends—it comes from understanding your skin and treating it with intention.

**Healthy skin ages better.**

steps.title: Discover
steps.text: Every journey begins with a personalized skin consultation. We’ll evaluate your skin, discuss your goals, and identify what’s contributing to your concerns so we can create a treatment plan tailored specifically to you.

steps.title: Customize
steps.text: Using advanced corrective skincare treatments and professional-grade products, we build a customized plan designed to improve your skin’s function, not just its appearance. Every recommendation is based on your unique skin, not a one-size-fits-all facial.

steps.title: Transform
steps.text: Through consistency, expert guidance, and treatments tailored to your skin, you’ll experience healthier, stronger, more resilient skin with results that continue to improve long after your appointment.

results.heading: Real results. Healthier skin.
results.body:
At **Polished Skin in Eugene, Oregon**, we specialize in **corrective skincare and age management** that improves your skin’s health, not just its appearance. Every treatment plan is customized to address your unique concerns, whether you’re looking to improve **fine lines, acne, rosacea, hyperpigmentation, dehydration, skin texture, or overall skin health**.

Our approach combines advanced treatments like **Glo2Facial®, Jet Plasma®, BioRePeel®, and ProCell® Microchanneling** to stimulate collagen, strengthen the skin barrier, reduce inflammation, and create healthier, more resilient skin.

**See the Difference**

Move the slider to compare real client before-and-after results from customized treatment plans.

These transformations aren’t the result of a single facial, they’re achieved through personalized care, professional guidance, consistency, and treatments designed specifically for each client’s skin.

Because at Polished Skin, we don’t chase quick fixes.

**We help your skin function better so it can look better.**

**Healthy skin ages better. That’s the difference.**

about.heading: Healthy skin starts here. Personalized care.
about.body:
At Polished Skin, we believe healthy skin ages better.

Founded by licensed esthetician **Analisa Hickey**, Polished Skin is a results-driven skincare studio in **Eugene, Oregon** specializing in **age management, corrective skincare, rosacea treatment, hyperpigmentation correction, acne support, and skin barrier restoration**.

Every treatment begins with understanding your skin, your concerns, and your goals. Whether you're looking to improve fine lines, wrinkles, redness, pigmentation, dehydration, acne, or overall skin health, your treatment plan is customized specifically for you.

Using advanced treatments including **Glo2Facial®, BioRePeel®, Jet Plasma®, ProCell Microchanneling®, and customized corrective facials**, we help improve skin function, stimulate collagen production, strengthen the skin barrier, and create visible results that continue to improve over time.

Unlike one-size-fits-all skincare, our approach combines professional expertise, advanced technology, and personalized care to help you achieve healthier, stronger, more radiant skin with confidence.

As a trusted Eugene esthetician, our mission is simple: **help your skin look better by helping it function better.**

**Healthy skin isn't created by quick fixes.** It's created through consistency, customization, and treatments that work with your skin, not against it.

reviewsSection.heading: Loved by Eugene
reviewsSection.sub: A few of the 64 five-star reviews from real clients.

cards.title: Personalized Treatment Plans
cards.text: Your skin is unique, and your treatment plan should be too. Every appointment is customized to your concerns, goals, lifestyle, and skin condition — whether you're focused on healthy aging, rosacea, pigmentation, acne, or restoring a compromised skin barrier.

cards.title: Advanced Corrective Skincare
cards.text: As a licensed esthetician and ProCell-certified specialist in Eugene, Oregon, Analisa combines advanced treatments including Glo2Facial®, BioRePeel®, Jet Plasma®, and ProCell Microchanneling® to create customized solutions that support healthier, stronger, more resilient skin.

cards.title: Results That Continue to Improve
cards.text: We focus on improving skin function, not just creating a temporary glow. By supporting collagen production, strengthening the skin barrier, improving hydration, and reducing inflammation, results continue to develop long after your appointment.

cards.title: Honest Recommendations
cards.text: No pressure. No unnecessary upsells. No one-size-fits-all treatment plans. You'll always understand why a treatment or home-care recommendation is being made and how it supports your goals.

cards.title: Healthy Skin Ages Better
cards.text: Our philosophy is simple: healthy skin is beautiful skin. Every treatment is designed to support your skin's natural ability to repair, renew, and thrive while creating visible improvements in tone, texture, firmness, and overall skin health.

cards.title: Trusted in Eugene
cards.text: With a 4.9-star Google rating and clients throughout Eugene and the surrounding area, Polished Skin has become a trusted destination for age management, corrective skincare, rosacea treatment, hyperpigmentation correction, skin barrier repair, and skin rejuvenation.

visit.heading: Visit the
visit.sub: In the heart of downtown Eugene — easy to find, easy to park.

cta.heading: Ready to
cta.text: Book online in under a minute. New clients always welcome.
